violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food were stored on the floor in the deli/bakery walk in freezer.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food * (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Containers of homemade taco dip trays in the display cooler by the dining area were dated sell by August 2nd. This exceeds the 10 days allowed in food code.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. The corners of the counter tops on the cabinets by the doors in the bakery are broken. Black tape was placed on the reach in cooler in the coffee area.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The handles on the white product bins in the bakery need to be cleaned. The inside of the cappuccino machine in the seating area needs to be cleaned.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Witnessed a deli employee using the front hand sink in the deli to wash a container of strawberries. Employee in the coffee bar was using the hand sink to rinse blenders and equipment before washing.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food were stored on the floor in the deli walk in freezer. Boxes of melons and strawberries were being stored on the floor in the produce walk in cooler. These items are being used for fruit trays and must not be stored on the floor.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Boxes of summer sausage were stored in between boxes of raw ground beef tubes and raw sausage in the meat department walk in cooler.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Employee in deli was wiping the counter after cutting whole melons with a dry cloth, and not a sanitized cloth. Employee had just cut whole melons and was moving to cut strawberries for fruit trays
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Tops and outside of ingredient bins in the bakery area need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of foil pans and cutlery kits were stored on the floor under the stainless steel counter across from the warming case.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Large deli trays and lids on the back storage shelves by the water heater were not inverted, or covered.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. A bin of items were being stored in the hand sink for the meat department.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee coat and back pack were put on the back counter in the bakery area over ingredient containers.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
